name: orderbook-dominator-workspace
description: Root control for LCX Sentinel and Dashboard

scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "SENTINEL,MONITOR,SHIELD,DASH" --prefix "[{name}]" "npm run sentinel" "npm run monitor" "npm run order-shield" "npm run dashboard"
scripts.dashboard: cd shield-dashboard && zig build-exe -O ReleaseFast src/main.zig && .\main.exe
